name: Theme Ninja
author: Alessandro Saba
description: Create, edit, preview, and apply Binary Ninja themes.
longdescription: Theme Ninja adds a cross-platform Binary Ninja theme editor with file theme discovery, color editing, live preview rendering, safe duplication, and no-restart save/apply flows.
